description: Stop hook checks context fill from transcript JSONL, triggers background summarizer over threshold, splices pending summary on idle turn. PreCompact hook intercepts CC's native compact attempt and splices our pre-prepared summary instead. Both splice paths SIGHUP the cch wrapper (when CCH_WRAPPER=1) to reload with the freshly compacted JSONL; without the wrapper (e.g. Agent SDK) the splice still lands on disk for the next subprocess to read on startup. SessionStart hook captures the resolved model identifier (including [1m] suffix) so the Stop hook can distinguish 1M from 200k variants, which the JSONL itself strips.
